mentions.note: Down 48% in 2025; tech research firm hammered by AI disintermediation. Businesses can access info directly; research middleman role eroding. No edge to suggest reversal; avoid.
Not a great quarter; Anthropic can easily replicate research and analysis; clients can go after them too easily; vulnerable to AI disruption.
Fourth-worst performer (−25%); IT consulting firm facing AI displacement threat; reported strong quarter but light full-year guidance; multiple shrinking.
